summary.note: RiskScore is intentionally excluded. Use prediction model for scoring.

details.statement:
-- ❌ Oracle 계층 쿼리
SELECT id, parent_id
FROM tree
CONNECT BY NOCYCLE PRIOR id = parent_id

matched_patterns.name: CONNECT BY Hierarchy
matched_patterns.description: CONNECT BY needs recursive CTE rewrite

matched_patterns.name: CONNECT BY NOCYCLE
matched_patterns.description: CONNECT BY NOCYCLE cycle detection has no direct MySQL equivalent
matched_patterns.impact: 순환 참조 탐지 누락 시 재귀 CTE 무한루프 발생 가능
matched_patterns.quant_signal: 재귀 CTE 실행 시 max_recursion 한계 도달 여부 확인

recommendations: Rewrite as WITH RECURSIVE with explicit visited-node SET tracking

details.statement:
-- ✅ MySQL WITH RECURSIVE
WITH RECURSIVE tree_cte AS (
    SELECT id, parent_id FROM tree WHERE parent_id IS NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT t.id, t.parent_id
    FROM tree t
    JOIN tree_cte c ON t.parent_id = c.id
)
SELECT * FROM tree_cte

matched_patterns.name: JOIN Without Index
matched_patterns.description: JOIN may degrade without join-key index
matched_patterns.impact: 조인 시 풀스캔/대량 rows 탐색 발생

matched_patterns.name: Nested Subquery
matched_patterns.description: Deep nested subqueries can degrade optimizer behavior
